title: Desktop app builder that ships real programs
excerpt: Most "desktop app builder" searches lead to no-code tools that stay in the web or mobile shape. What changes when the builder is an open-source runtime that ships a real program a person and an agent can both edit.

title: Retool alternative for teams without engineers
excerpt: What changes when the answer is a real app you can run on your own machine, not an internal-tools platform you have to deploy.

title: Airtable alternative: a real app, not a spreadsheet
excerpt: What changes when the answer is an open-source app on your own machine instead of another base.

title: Lovable alternative: open-source, runs on your desktop
excerpt: What changes when the AI app builder is open-source, portable, and starts on your own machine.
